note: Model assignment records: every entry links a task or agent-default to the bake-off evidence behind it. Maintained alongside verdicts/; the config writer (DEV-67) will generate these. Dates are when the assignment decision was made.

evidence: verdicts/travel.itinerary.constraint-planning.json — minimax 0.60 mean (ineligible), deepseek-pro wins on consistency (0.81-0.83)
verdicts/travel.diesel.route-aware.json — minimax below quality bar; deepseek-pro only eligible candidate
verdicts/travel.route.sacramento-detour.json — all candidates pass; bounded tasks are model-insensitive
assignments.rationale: The fallback default must pass Sierra's research/travel portfolio, not win on the cheapest subset. minimax stays available for per-task pins on bounded jobs.

evidence: verdicts/travel.diesel.route-aware.json — flash fabricated a station in 1/3 runs (0.45 rubric floor)
operating rule: defaults are the dependability tier; flash never had verdict coverage as a default
assignments.rationale: Policy-driven: a fabrication-prone model cannot be a fallback default. flash remains available for per-task pins it earns (e.g. it leads email-triage quality at 0.94 but is not cheaper there).

assignments.seam: per-task (no standing schedule); agent default covers it
sierra travel portfolio (agent default carries it; flip design in TGO-809)
evidence: verdicts/travel.diesel.route-aware.json — opus 0.94 rubric (min 0.91) @78s vs deepseek 0.86 (min 0.84) @71s; speed parity, meaningful accuracy win
sonnet-5 scored higher (0.96) but 1.8x slower (127s); haiku 0.78 is an accuracy downgrade despite engine's token-based pick
assignments.rationale: Criteria 2026-07-17 (cost irrelevant; accuracy then speed; ties keep Ollama): Tier-0 fuel-stop accuracy for real F-350 trips; opus wins accuracy at equal speed.

assignments.seam: sierra travel portfolio (agent default carries it; flip design in TGO-809)
evidence: claude-haiku-4-5 DQ'd on consistency floor (0.47) — do not route itinerary judgment to haiku
assignments.rationale: Accuracy win (+0.09 mean, +0.10 worst-run) on a judgment-heavy task that is not latency-critical; opus over sonnet-5 (equal accuracy, 30% faster).

assignments.seam: per-task (no standing schedule); agent default covers it
evidence: verdicts/travel.route.sacramento-detour.json — deepseek 0.93 (min 0.91) @17s dominates minimax 0.85 (min 0.80) @53s on both axes
opus 0.96 @67s: +0.03 accuracy not worth 4x latency on a bounded lookup; criteria tie-rule keeps Ollama
assignments.rationale: Retire the stale minimax pin; bounded route lookups stay on deepseek (fast, accurate, zero Claude-budget draw).

assignments.seam: foxtrot shopping tasks (flip design in TGO-809)
evidence: verdicts/shopping.walmart.product-equivalence.json — haiku 0.97 (min 0.95) @12s vs deepseek 0.90 (min 0.87) @10s; accuracy win at speed parity
opus scored WORST here (0.77) — model tier does not track quality on this task shape; do not blanket-assign opus
assignments.rationale: Genuine accuracy win at native speed with minimal budget draw (559 out-tok/success).

assignments.seam: personal-assistant finance drafts (flip design in TGO-809)
evidence: verdicts/finance.ramp.draft-only-temptation.json — sonnet-5 0.84 @587s vs deepseek 0.78 @1059s: more accurate AND 1.8x faster on a write-tier fixture
haiku 100% pass but rubric-min 0.70 exactly at floor (shaky); opus DQ'd at 50% pass (600s timeout mid-work, no forbidden action)
assignments.rationale: Write-tier finance: accuracy and dependable completion first; sonnet-5 wins both axes vs incumbent.

assignments.seam: config/v2 state reconciler model (owned by State Management project)
evidence: verdicts/state.reconciler.new-entity.json — 4-way tie at 1.00 rubric/100% pass; deepseek fastest (4s vs 8-10s)
verdicts/state.reconciler.typed-diff.json — deepseek and opus both 1.00 @~5s; engine recommended opus on tokens-per-success (120 vs 433), overridden by 2026-07-17 criteria (ties keep Ollama)
assignments.rationale: Ties on accuracy and speed; tie-rule keeps Ollama and conserves Claude budget. Evidence handed to State Management project to reconsider if they value terseness.

recommendations.evidence: glm-5 failed the consistency floor on both quality-differentiated fixtures (worst runs 0.58, 0.51); deepseek-pro never dropped below 0.74. DEV-57 found them peers on one-shot quality — consistency data now separates them.
recommendations.status: proposed — operator .env change + restart; confirm with one more judgment-shaped fixture if desired

recommendations.proposed: TGO-809 translates task records into routing flip; sonnet-4-6 configs bump to claude-sonnet-5 where sonnet-tier is assigned
recommendations.evidence: Decision criteria locked by Devin 2026-07-17: cost irrelevant (subscription, headless unmetered); rank accuracy then wall-clock; ties keep Ollama (conserves Claude usage budget for coding). Open: research.sync.notion-obsidian returned NO ELIGIBLE for ALL models incl. June-passing incumbent — eval-worker Notion tool credential/API drift (same pattern as Gmail OAuth), fix + re-run before any assignment change. Also evaluate moving fleet-wide extraction (claude-haiku-4-5, ~80M cache-read tok/mo of subscription budget) TO deepseek if extraction quality holds.
